sql:
SELECT
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY NODE_NUM) AS ROWNUM,
            node.*
        FROM (
            SELECT
                TNM.NODE_NUM,
                TNM.NODE_ID,
                TNM.NODE_NM,
                TNM.MODEL_NUM,
                TNM.MODEL_ID,
                CODE.CODE_NM,
                TNM.IP_ADDR,
                TNM.MAC_ADDR,
                TNM.ADMIN_YN,
                CASE
                	WHEN ADMIN_YN = 'W' THEN '사용'
                	ELSE '미사용' 
                    	END AS ADMIN_YN_INFO,
                TNM.PRIMARY_GB,
                TNM.SNMP_VER,
                TNM.SNMP_COMMUNITY,
                TNM.SNMP_PORT,
                TNM.LATITUDE,
                TNM.LONGITUDE,
                TNM.NETCONF_PORT,
                TNM.NETCONF_ID,
                TNM.NETCONF_PW,
                TNM.NETCONF_TYPE,
                TNM.NODE_DIVISION,
                TNM.VENDOR,
                TNM.SFLOW_IP,
                TO_CHAR(TNM.CHNG_DATETIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MI:SS') AS CHNG_DATETIME
                FROM RESOURCE.TB_NODE_MST TNM
                LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_CODE CODE ON (TNM.MODEL_ID = CODE.CODE_ID)
                WHERE 1=1
                    AND tnm.NODE_NM like '%' || 'seoul-cxp1' || '%'
                ORDER BY CHNG_DATETIME ASC
        ) AS node
        ORDER BY NODE_NUM
            LIMIT 50 OFFSET 0
